scope.name: ISSUE_1626_CLOSURE_AUDIT
scope.purpose: Determine closure eligibility of Issue #1626 (Governed PR / Merge System) by evaluating repository evidence against acceptance criteria. Non-mutating evidence-only audit.

closure_determination.reason: Current GitHub ruleset evidence shows mindshift-main-governance is active on ~DEFAULT_BRANCH with non_fast_forward, dismiss_stale_reviews_on_push, required_review_thread_resolution, strict_required_status_checks_policy, and required checks generate-preo-candidate, generate-sco-candidate, constitutional-integrity, and merge-governance-check. Repository settings show allow_auto_merge false, merge_queue null, and current_user_can_bypass never. Closure-blocking bypasses are closed; MB-007 and MB-009 remain PARTIAL but documented/classified rather than unresolved.

issue_1626_criteria_evaluation.criterion: Stale reviews detected when PR head changes
issue_1626_criteria_evaluation.evidence: PREO commit_id == head_sha binding; mismatch produces LEGITIMACY_NULL

issue_1626_criteria_evaluation.criterion: PREO generated from PR metadata without executing merge
Merge eligibility requires exact reviewed object match
issue_1626_criteria_evaluation.evidence: Active ruleset requires merge-governance-check, merge-guard, generate-preo-candidate, generate-sco-candidate, and constitutional-integrity with strict_required_status_checks_policy.

issue_1626_criteria_evaluation.criterion: Merge proof links to PR number, head SHA, merge commit SHA, reviewer state, and PREO hash
Direct merge / bypass paths classified as OPEN, PARTIAL, UNKNOWN, or BREAK_GLASS
No merge execution introduced by this issue
issue_1626_criteria_evaluation.evidence: All artifacts are non-operative; workflows generate proofs only after merge completes

implementation_matrix.note: Active GitHub ruleset requires PREO/SCO/Merge Guard/governance checks: generate-preo-candidate, generate-sco-candidate, constitutional-integrity, merge-governance-check, merge-guard.
Active GitHub ruleset mindshift-main-governance applies to ~DEFAULT_BRANCH; current_user_can_bypass is never.

paths.closed_by: Closed by active ruleset on ~DEFAULT_BRANCH requiring PR admission and non-fast-forward protection.
Closed for this audit by current_user_can_bypass: never in observed repository settings.
Closed by dismiss_stale_reviews_on_push: true and strict_required_status_checks_policy: true.
Closed by required check generate-preo-candidate and merge-governance-check in active ruleset.
Closed by required check generate-sco-candidate and merge-governance-check in active ruleset.

paths.rationale: Retained partial: workflow-dispatch/write-token surfaces remain classified and bounded, not fully eliminated by ruleset evidence.

paths.closed_by: Closed by PREO head_sha binding and stale review dismissal on push.

paths.rationale: Retained partial: observed Integration bypass actor actor_id 1144995 with bypass_mode always is documented and classified.

paths.closed_by: Closed by repository setting merge_queue: null and allow_auto_merge: false.

closure_blocking_gaps.title: Branch Protection Enforcement Is Advisory Only
closure_blocking_gaps.closed_evidence: GitHub ruleset mindshift-main-governance is active on ~DEFAULT_BRANCH with non_fast_forward, strict_required_status_checks_policy, required review controls, and required PREO/SCO/governance checks.

closure_blocking_gaps.title: Admin Bypass Cannot Be Prevented by Repository Code
closure_blocking_gaps.closed_evidence: Repository setting current_user_can_bypass is never. Admin/root authority bypass remains classified as non-legitimacy if exercised, but it is not an unresolved Issue #1626 closure blocker in the observed ruleset state.

closure_blocking_gaps.title: Merge Queue Combined SHA Not Covered by PREO
closure_blocking_gaps.closed_evidence: Repository settings show merge_queue null and allow_auto_merge false.

closure_blocking_gaps.title: Bot/App Bypass Actor Not Fully Eliminated
closure_blocking_gaps.closed_evidence: Observed bypass actor is documented as actor_id 1144995, actor_type Integration, bypass_mode always. MB-009 remains PARTIAL but no longer unresolved.

closure_blocking_gaps.title: No Merge Proof Generation Mechanism
closure_blocking_gaps.closed_evidence: merge-proof.yml operational; 42 proofs in registry as of 2026-06-03

closure_blocking_gaps.title: Phase 1 Deploy Closure Not Yet Confirmed
closure_blocking_gaps.closed_evidence: This refresh evaluates Issue #1626 merge-governance closure against current GitHub ruleset evidence; no remaining merge bypass blocker is unresolved.

observed_bypass_actor.rationale: Observed integration bypass actor is documented as MB-009 residual partial path; it is classified rather than unresolved.
